Interface ElasticsearchTypeMapper

All Superinterfaces:
TypeMapper<Map<String, @Nullable Object>>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultElasticsearchTypeMapper
public interface ElasticsearchTypeMapper extends TypeMapper<Map<String, @Nullable Object>>
Elasticsearch specific TypeMapper definition.
Since:
3.2
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • isTypeKey

      boolean isTypeKey(String key)
      Returns whether the given key is the type key.
      Returns:
      true if given key is used as type hint key.
